description: Resolve critical bugs, convention violations, and code smells identified in waiter module review (Task ses_0b2aa9e8bffezGOC11wB0laJ9w). Group into atomic, PR-able tasks.

tasks.description: Fix direct waiter routes bypassing dock (Option C): redirect /worker/{take-order,day-menu,orders} to /worker?tab=X; hoist <app-order-dock /> to worker-area.html with SERVICE/WAITER-only gate; dashboard reads ?tab on init.

DayMenu can add item before product options load. Disable order btn until options resolve; cancel stale requests; show error toast on options API failure; preload MasterData tables when component loads.
TodayOrders: fix UTC vs local date timezone bug, add realtime subscription, add request cancellation to prevent stale-response races.
Carta product options modal: cancel stale getProductOptions() when pendingProduct changes so product A options don't populate product B modal.
Fix determineWorkerType to use priority (SERVICE>WAITER>KITCHEN); start notification polling for both SERVICE and WAITER.
Confirm before removing diner with items; remove selected diner not always last; show item/price totals across all diners.
Recompute allDinerOrders at confirmation accept time, not before dialog opens.
Rename class suffixes, add missing styleUrl, fix import group order.
Replace native input/select/button with PrimeNG components in waiter templates.
Add skeleton components per conventions §12 for Day Menu, Carta, Today Orders.
Extract shared ProductOptionsModal component for Day Menu and Carta.
Replace custom fixed alerts in order-dock.html with MessageService/p-toast.
Remove unused injections, fix processing: Set→signal, clean dead state.
Resolve z-50 overlap between modals (z-60) and dock (z-40).
Pull msg from HttpErrorResponse.error.message instead of just instanceof Error.

description: Replace unsafe auto-assign findAvailableTable() with explicit table picker in dock. Waiter chooses table; surface backend conflicts; invalidate tables after mutation.

tasks.description: Add availableTables signal + loader integration in OrderDockService. Trigger preload on waiter dashboard init.
UI: table picker inside OrderDockComponent replacing findAvailableTable() auto-assign.
Validate selected table before placeOrder; block submit if none selected.
Invalidate availableTables cache after order create/cancel; reload tables on dock open.
Surface 409 backend errors as specific toasts instead of generic msg.
